meta.title: Deployments | Advanced Battery Concepts
meta.description: Three deployment configurations for ABC bipolar lead batteries: outdoor enclosures, BoxBe containers, and Battery Barn utility-scale facilities.
meta.og_description: Three deployment configurations for ABC bipolar lead batteries: outdoor enclosures, BoxBe containers, and Battery Barn utility-scale facilities.

hero.label: Deployment Methodology
hero.title: One Unit. Scale to Any Project.
hero.desc: The CEES™ 48 kWh cartridge is ABC's modular building block. Depending on scale, it deploys in three configurations: outdoor-rated enclosures for distributed installations, BoxBe ISO containers for mid-range projects, or constructed Battery Barn facilities for utility-scale storage.

deployment_cards.image_alt: CEES™ 48 kWh outdoor-rated enclosure for distributed energy storage deployment
deployment_cards.desc: CEES™ units deploy in outdoor-rated NEMA3R/IP55 enclosures, linked to wall-mounted inverters. No building required. Ideal for remote sites, microgrids, island infrastructure, and installations where space is limited or construction is impractical. As deployed at the Manitou Islands project for the National Park Service.
deployment_cards.label: Outdoor Enclosures
deployment_cards.title: Direct Deployment for Distributed Sites

deployment_cards.image_alt: BoxBe 20-foot ISO container with pre-integrated CEES™ cartridges
deployment_cards.desc: Pre-integrated CEES™ cartridges housed in standard 10-foot ISO containers (384 kWh) or 20-foot ISO containers (768 kWh). Factory tested, transportable by standard flatbed, and deployable in weeks. Outdoor rated with IP55/NEMA3R protection and greater than 90% round-trip efficiency.
deployment_cards.label: BoxBe Containers
deployment_cards.title: Containerized Storage, Ready to Ship

deployment_cards.image_alt: Battery Barn interior showing 432 CEES™ cartridges stacked 4-high in 6 rows, ventilation ducts and hydrogen sensors on ceiling
deployment_cards.desc: Purpose-built warehouse facility housing 432 CEES™ cartridges for 5 MW / 20 MWh capacity. No HVAC, no fire suppression, no augmentation. Where lithium-ion demands 3 to 5 acres for equivalent capacity, ABC fits in a single building. 15-year daily cycle life warranty with zero augmentation cost.
deployment_cards.label: Battery Barn
deployment_cards.title: Utility-Scale in 6,000 Square Feet

case_study.label: Proven Deployment
case_study.title: Manitou Islands, National Park Service
case_study.heading: 72 kW / 288 kWh Off-Grid System
case_study.desc: Deployed for the United States Federal Government at Sleeping Bear Dunes National Shoreline. CEES™ outdoor enclosures with wall-mounted inverters powering all island infrastructure. Balanced three-phase 208V system configuration with two inverters per phase. Continuous power delivery in a remote, environmentally sensitive location.
list_items: National Park Service, Sleeping Bear Dunes National Shoreline
Two inverters per phase, six total
Remote island deployment, no grid connection
case_study.image_alt: CEES™ battery storage units deployed at coastal island for National Park Service

items.image_alt: CEES™ battery storage units operating in extreme desert heat at 55 degrees Celsius
items.title: Desert & Extreme Heat
items.desc: Operates without climate control in conditions that require active cooling for lithium.

items.image_alt: CEES™ battery storage units operating in arctic conditions at -40 degrees Celsius
items.title: Arctic & Sub-Zero
items.desc: Full performance at temperatures that shut down lithium-ion entirely.

items.image_alt: CEES™ battery storage units deployed at a remote mountain outpost
items.title: Mountain & Remote
items.desc: Reliable storage for high-altitude and difficult-access locations.

items.image_alt: CEES™ battery storage units deployed in coastal flood zone
items.title: Coastal & Flood Zone
items.desc: Flood-survivable, salt-resistant energy storage for vulnerable coastlines and islands.
